message.content: @startuml skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 skinparam classFontName Arial skinparam classFontSize 14 skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5 skinparam classBorderColor #333333 skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E8E8E8 skinparam classHeaderBorderColor #333333 skinparam classHeaderFontColor #000000 skinparam classAttributeFontColor #000000 skinparam classMethodFontColor #000000 skinparam classAttributeIconColor #FF0000 skinparam classMethodIconColor #00AA00 class "MonoBehaviour" as MonoBehaviour { } class "DropdownSample" as DropdownSample { + text : TextMeshProUGUI = null + dropdownWithoutPlaceholder : TMP_Dropdown = null + dropdownWithPlaceholder : TMP_Dropdown = null + OnButtonClick() : void } MonoBehaviour <|-- DropdownSample note top of MonoBehaviour C end note note top of DropdownSample C end note @enduml
